runs.text:
DON'T PUT THESE MASKS ON! In this terrifying homage to Halloween III: Season of the Witch, Jillian & Addie find three masks with mysterious powers. Fans of John Carpenter's Halloween franchise, Locke & Key, Twilight Zone, Stranger Things, Creeped Out, Goosebumps, and Scary Stories to Tell in the Dark will love this creepy chronicle!
OFFICIAL MERCHANDISE ►
Jillian & Addie who have made over a thousand videos which have been seen by over a million subscribers, over a billion views across all channels.  Produced by  their father Bob.

channelMetadataRenderer.title: Jillian and Addie
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Jillian and Addie (formerly Babyteeth4) features teenager Jillian and her sister Addie starring in mysteries, spooky skits, epic mini movies, all aimed at teens and up!

Produced by their father Bob, their videos have entertained millions viewers around the world since 2008.  

Order merchandise at: https://teespring.com/stores/jillian-addie

For business inquiries (samples, adverts, media, etc.) contact Semaphore (see below).
channelMetadataRenderer.keywords: teens teenagers funny spoof comedy offbeat spooky creepy skits
